title: Oonche Log
overview: A blind, principled Major Chandrakant takes in a stranger on the run, unaware the man murdered his younger, irresponsible son who had abandoned a pregnant woman, leading to her suicide. The Major's elder son, a police inspector, is investigating the murder, creating a dramatic conflict of duty, family, and justice.

trailers.title: JAAG DIL -E DEWANA RUT JAAGI -RAFI -MAJROOH - CHITRAGUPT ( OONCHE LOG 1965)
